title: Low on Water! - The Ultimate Realism
description: Minecraft, but way more realistic while being enjoyable to play in both survival and creative.
body:
## ⚡ Important ##
This modpack is in Beta stage.

**Any bugs can be reported or suggestions be sent [in our discord server](https://discord.gg/5PCXmRYcJc)**.

# ❗ About
> ❔ Want **a realistic Minecraft modpack which does not add random dangerous unrealistic monsters?** _(—not mentioning RLCraft lol)_ The meaning of realistic is this modpack _(except there are still floating blocks..., hmmm, anyway!)_
>
> **You can look at the "Features" part down this page for features list.**
###
> 🧑‍💻 This modpack **is just in Modrinth and won't be ported to Curseforge**.
# 💡 Check Out My Other Modpacks #
> **Ultimately Optimized - Vanilla but Better!** : **Vanilla**, but with tons and tons of **client-side features, visual improvements and quality of life changes**.
>
>
> **[Check It Out Right Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-ultimately-optimized)**
>
>
> **Create Ultimate Pack - The Industrial Age** : The **ultimate experiance of Create mod and its addons**.
>
> 
> **[Check It Out Right Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-ultimate-pack)**
>
>
# 📃 Features
These are current key features of this modpack in the latest version (v0.1.1), the modpack will get more features as it goes trough development.

> - **Realistic Fluid Physics**
>
> Water and lava are finite and have better physics. Hydrated farmlands drain water.
> - **Create Mod**
>
> The industrial age has born. What you do is up to you.
> - **New Types of Food**
>
> Try some farming, "Farmer's Delight" got you!
> - **Realistic Body Temperature, Health, and Thirst**
>
> I think you are low on water! Find some to fill up thirst.
> - **New Animations**
>
> Mobs' animations along with player movement and combat animations, all in one modpack!
> - **Movement and Combat Overhuals**
>
> Parkour around the areas to reach your enemies and fight them. Some backported features of Jeb's Combat Test snapshots are here.
> - **Seasons**
>
> Seasons change how crops grow, your body temperature and the colors of the foliage.
> - **Falling Trees and Vein Mining**
>
> Chop one log of the tree, the tree falls with a nice animation. Use crop harvesting features to get resources in bulk.
> - **New Biomes, Mobs, and Structures**
>
> It's adventure time! Look for new biomes, structures, and overhauled vanilla biomes.
> - **Overhauled Ender Dragon Fight**
>
> Hmmmm, that's a challange!
> - **Backpacks**
>
> A giant thing behind you that stores many items, duh.
> - **Quality of Life Changes**
>
> Many many quality of life changes and improvements inside the modpack. Too long to list!
> - **Many optimization mods**
>
> Modpacks without optimizations are nothing in my opinion!

# 🎫 Licencing #
> This modpack is licensed under **Creative Commons Attribution Non Commercial No Derivatives 4.0 International**. A summary of it means that you, as a user of this project, can **redistributable my project as long as it isn't modified, it isn't for commercial use, and you credit me and my project**.
